edited.description:
Just outside Fastello, overlooking a small island that looks straight out of a postcard, this garage offers something not everyone can afford: peace… and the perfect excuse to never finish that project car.

Between tools, engines and the distant sound of the sea, some say that if you look closely, you might even find a coin hidden somewhere around here.

We don’t confirm it. But we don’t deny it either.
edited.name: Isola Vista Garage
